body.text: This procedure defines how BUBU onboards a new client, from signed agreement to project kickoff, so every engagement starts the same clean way.
Applies to all new client engagements handled by the Account and Strategy teams.

items: Account Manager confirms the signed agreement and files it in the client folder.
Strategy assigns a project lead and creates the project workspace.
Project lead schedules the kickoff meeting within five working days.
Run the kickoff, capture decisions, and circulate the Minutes of Meeting.
Set up the recurring work-in-progress (WIP) cadence with the client.

body.text: No production work starts before the signed agreement is filed and the kickoff MOM is circulated.
